specific_question: How much time on average was saved on new marketing department employee onboarding because of the changes in the training materials the KM team introduced in Q4 2024?
answer: As a result of the revised training materials introduced in Q4 2024 by the KM team, the average time to onboard new marketing specialists was reduced by almost 2 hours.
